_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of legal rules of evidence and court procedure.
reference_document_element_description: Produce analytical documentation that meets the evidence standard required for regulatory, audit, or executive decision support contexts.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-005 (RC, cosine: 0.554), RC-K-014 (RC, cosine: 0.527).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.7/10 (raw 0.373). Shared vocabulary: [evidence]. DCWF-only terms [court, knowledge, legal, procedure, rules] vs WIDAI-only terms [analytical, audit, contexts, decision, documentation, executive] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.880, R=0.857). P exceeds R by 0.023 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of legal rules of evidence and court procedure." and "Produce analytical documentation that meets the evidence standard required for r" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.555 > STS 0.373 (gap +0.182). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [evidence] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.2%. Shared tokens: [evidence]. DCWF-only: [court, knowledge, legal, procedure, rules]. WIDAI-only: [analytical, audit, contexts, decision, documentation, executive].

signals.detail: STS 0.373 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.182 with low STS 0.373. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
